heading: Lower Duck Creek vs Lower Lewis Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Duck Creek, New South Wales and Lower Lewis Ponds, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Duck Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lower Lewis Ponds (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Duck Creek or Lower Lewis Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Duck Creek has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Lower Lewis Ponds scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Duck Creek scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Lewis Ponds scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Duck Creek or Lower Lewis Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Duck Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
